creatives.niche_raw: retro gaming collectors, fans of classic licensed cartridges, nostalgia-driven gamers who want physical media
creatives.angle_raw: the definitive licensed retro game collection on physical cartridges — relive the classics the right way

mechanism: The biggest collection of classic, licensed video game cartridges

notes: Evercade leads with licensed cartridges as the primary differentiator — 'the most licensed retro game cartridges' is the structural bet. Positioned on licensed authenticity, NOT on hackability or open-source. Pre-order for Nexus generation system at $199.99. Positioned squarely in retro-nostalgia territory.
